entries.source: Maintain simulation state across turns: location, time, identity, money, inventory, relationships, reputation, risk, event clock, field notes, and evidence confidence. Apply realistic consequences in strict mode.
entries.value: Maintenez l’état de la simulation au fil des tours : lieu, temps, identité, argent, inventaire, relations, réputation, risque, horloge des événements, notes de terrain et niveau de confiance des preuves. Appliquez des conséquences réalistes en mode strict.

entries.source: Maintain two layers: an in-character voice bounded by the selected time and worldview, and a historian sidecar that flags documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, anachronism, and uncertainty. Let the person resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, or reject false premises when historically fitting.
entries.value: Maintenez deux couches : une voix dans le rôle, limitée par l’époque et la vision du monde choisies, et un module d’historien qui signale les faits documentés, les reconstructions plausibles, les interprétations contestées, les paraphrases modernes, les anachronismes et l’incertitude. Laissez la personne résister, contester, esquiver, poser des questions en retour ou rejeter de fausses prémisses lorsque c’est historiquement approprié.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Coach d’étapes mathématiques pour résoudre les problèmes avec compréhension est une façon ciblée d’utiliser l’IA pour apprendre plutôt que de collecter passivement des réponses. Le mode est construit autour d’un objectif précis : résoudre les mathématiques en comprenant chaque étape. Votre coach vérifie votre travail, signale les erreurs et développe la confiance.

entries.source: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between learning from a historical person and endorsing them.
entries.value: Never present generated dialogue as authenticated quotation. Do not sanitize harmful views or glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context should clarify without excusing. Do not give medical, legal, financial, or harmful advice through the persona. Preserve the difference between apprentissage from a historique person and endorsing them.

entries.source: Never reveal future answers. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.
entries.value: Never reveal future réponses. Avoid trick questions unless the topic calls for advanced challenge.

entries.source: No waiver by Company of any term or condition set forth in Terms shall be deemed a further or continuing waiver of such term or condition or a waiver of any other term or condition, and any failure of Company to assert a right or provision under Terms shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of Terms is held by a court or other tribunal of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable for any reason, such provision shall be eliminated or limited to the minimum extent such that the remaining provisions of Terms will continue in full force and effect.
entries.value: Aucune renonciation par la Société à une modalité ou condition énoncée dans les Conditions ne sera considérée comme une renonciation supplémentaire ou continue à cette modalité ou condition, ni comme une renonciation à toute autre modalité ou condition ; le fait que la Société n’exerce pas un droit ou une disposition prévu par les Conditions ne constitue pas une renonciation à ce droit ou à cette disposition. Si une disposition des Conditions est jugée invalide, illégale ou inapplicable pour quelque raison que ce soit par un tribunal ou une autre juridiction compétente, cette disposition sera supprimée ou limitée dans la mesure minimale nécessaire afin que les dispositions restantes des Conditions demeurent pleinement en vigueur.

entries.source: No. Private saved chats use private identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in AI discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.
entries.value: Non. Private chats enregistrés use privé identifiers, are not listed in the sitemap, and are not included in IA discovery files such as llms.txt, llms-full.txt, or ai-content-index.json.

entries.source: No. Public pages are indexable, but private saved chats are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or AI content index.
entries.value: Non. Les pages publiques are indexable, but privé chats enregistrés are not included in the sitemap, llms files, or IA content index.

entries.source: No. Public subject pages and guest mode entrypoints are indexable, but private saved chats are excluded from discovery files.
entries.value: Non. Public subject pages and invité mode entrypoints are indexable, but privé chats enregistrés are excluded from discovery files.

entries.source: No. The category structure helps search engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a learner choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.
entries.value: Non. The category structure helps recherche engines understand the library, but each page is meant to help a apprenant choose a guide, open the right mode, and keep studying actively.

entries.source: No. The comparison links only to public guest-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and learning paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.
entries.value: Non. The comparison links only to public invité-mode entrypoints, guides, prompt libraries, and apprentissage paths. Private saved conversations are not used as source content.

entries.source: No. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live AI tutoring, prompts, and guest learning modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.
entries.value: Non. The comparison pages are written to show when inspir is a better first click for live IA tutoring, prompts, and invité apprentissage modes, and when a structured curriculum or official course library may still be useful.

entries.source: No. They link only to public pages, public guest modes, guides, prompts, and learning paths. Private saved chats stay outside discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Non. They link only to pages publiques, public invité modes, guides, prompts, and apprentissage paths. Private chats enregistrés stay outside discovery surfaces.

entries.source: No. Treat generated dialogue as a learning simulation. Cite real primary or secondary sources for factual claims.
entries.value: Non. Traite le dialogue généré comme une simulation d'apprentissage. Cite de vraies sources primaires ou secondaires pour les affirmations factuelles.

entries.source: Not across every learning need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and practice. inspir is useful when a learner needs live AI help, Socratic questions, hints, quizzes, flashcards, feedback, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.
entries.value: Not across every apprentissage need. Khan Academy is useful for structured lessons and pratique. inspir is useful when a apprenant needs live IA help, Socratic questions, indices, quizzes, cartes mémoire, retour, or a study workflow around the exact thing they are working on.

entries.source: Once the Cancellation Period is over, Tao will not refund the subscription fee even if you decide to cancel your subscription. For requesting a cancellation, you must contact Tao customer care or address an email to support@inspir.app. Once you opt to cancel your subscription, you will no longer have access to the subscription features.
entries.value: Une fois la période d’annulation terminée, Tao ne remboursera pas les frais d’abonnement même si vous décidez d’annuler votre abonnement. Pour demander une annulation, vous devez contacter le service client de Tao ou envoyer un e-mail à support@inspir.app. Une fois l’annulation choisie, vous n’aurez plus accès aux fonctionnalités de l’abonnement.

entries.source: One AI learning system, several school jobs.
entries.value: One apprentissage IA system, several école jobs.

entries.source: One map for modes, prompts, paths, and guides.
entries.value: Une carte unique pour les modes, les prompts, les parcours et les guides.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: One erreur apprenants make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, révisioning it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
